hero.title: Fully Fashioned Knitwear for Global Brands
hero.description: Maglificio Pini supports premium and luxury brands with fully fashioned knitwear development and production, combining Italian craftsmanship, technical expertise, and reliable execution.

intro.title: Crafted in Italy. Trusted Worldwide.
intro.description: Founded in 1977, Maglificio Pini is a family-owned Italian knitwear manufacturer specialized in high-end fully fashioned garments. Nearly five decades of experience, technical know-how, and continuous research allow us to support demanding brands from concept to production.

items.label: Founded
items.description: A long-standing heritage in Italian knitwear manufacturing.

items.label: Archive Pieces
items.description: Garments and stitch developments collected over decades.

items.label: Integrated Facility
items.description: A structured production environment with key processes managed in-house.

company.title: A Structured Partner for Demanding Collections
paragraphs: Maglificio Pini was founded in the Romagna Apennines in Italy as a family company dedicated to high-quality knitwear. Over the years, it has grown into a trusted development and manufacturing partner for international premium and luxury brands.
The company works exclusively in fully fashioned knitwear and manages all key development phases internally, from research and sampling to linking, finishing, and quality control.
Today, under second-generation leadership, Maglificio Pini combines artisanal sensitivity, industrial consistency, and an increasingly international perspective.
highlights: In-house R&D, sampling, linking, finishing, and quality control
Advanced Shima Seiki machinery across multiple gauges
MOQ starting from 50 pieces per style

items.title: Study & Research
items.description: Continuous experimentation in stitches, techniques, fit, and yarn proposals to transform creative ideas into technically viable knitwear solutions.

items.title: Sampling
items.description: Rapid and accurate prototype development with attention to proportion, construction, and product identity.

items.title: Production
items.description: Premium small-to-medium production runs with consistency, precision, and respect for timelines.

items.title: Technical Development
items.description: Advanced support for complex knitwear structures including jacquard, intarsia, special constructions, brushing, twisting, embroidery, applications, and printing on request.

items.title: 1. Creative Brief
items.description: We align on product vision, collection needs, yarn direction, and technical objectives.

items.title: 2. Research & Sampling
items.description: We develop swatches, stitches, and prototypes with speed, precision, and technical dialogue.

items.title: 3. Production
items.description: We organize production internally with strict attention to quality, consistency, and delivery planning.

items.title: 4. Finishing & Control
items.description: Linking, finishing, ironing, and quality control are managed with the same care given to development.

technology.title: Technology Supporting Craftsmanship
technology.description: Our facility is equipped with advanced Shima Seiki electronic flat knitting machines covering multiple gauges, from heavy knitwear to fine gauge developments. Internal departments also include yarn twisting, brushing, garment assembly, finishing, and RFID-based product tracking.

expertise.title: Built for Complexity
expertise.description: Maglificio Pini is particularly valued for advanced pattern development and technically refined knitwear. We support brands seeking more than production alone: a partner able to interpret design intent and translate it into precise, manufacturable garments.

archive.title: A Living Archive of Knitwear Knowledge
archive.description: More than 4,000 garments and stitch developments form a unique historical archive that serves both as inspiration and as a practical tool for product development. It reflects decades of work, experimentation, and manufacturing culture.

sustainability.title: Responsible Growth
sustainability.description: Our approach to sustainability is concrete and measurable. Maglificio Pini is certified as an Ethical Company and participates in circular initiatives for the recovery and recycling of production waste. Upon request, we are fully equipped to work with certified sustainable yarns.

items.title: Made in Italy
items.description: Authentic manufacturing quality rooted in Italian textile culture.

items.title: Reliability
items.description: A consistent and structured partner for development and production.

items.title: Research
items.description: Continuous experimentation in stitches, fit, and technical solutions.

items.title: Care
items.description: Attention to detail in both product execution and client relationships.

contact.title: Let’s Build Your Next Knitwear Collection
contact.description: Get in touch to discuss yarns, development needs, timelines, minimums, and production opportunities.
